title: [MTR4]Guangzhou Metro Class D|广州地铁D型车
description: Guangzhou Metro Class D, including lines 18 and 22, completely original|广州地铁D型车，包括18号线和22号线,全部原创
body:
广州地铁D形车，根据中国高铁改编，最高时速160km/h，是中国目前最快的地铁线路。此作品公开后，大家可以不用再忍受爱发电上Satiric Party 136付费广州地铁资源包的折磨。
注意！所有版本必须要一起下载！不然列车会有缺失！

The Guangzhou Metro class-D train, adapted from China's high-speed rail, has a top speed of 160km/h and is currently the fastest metro line in China. After the release of this work, everyone can no longer endure the torment of using Satiric Party 136 paid Guangzhou Metro resource package on AiFaDian.
Attention! All versions must be downloaded together! Otherwise, the train will be missing!
